testcase.name: TensorComponentsTest2
testcase.success: SUCCESS : assertion: 'std::abs(tensor<N, double>::generateIdComponent(i) - id(i)) < 1.e-14' SUCCESS : assertion: 'std::abs(tensor<N, double>::generateIdComponent(i) - id(i)) < 1.e-14' SUCCESS : assertion: 'std::abs(tensor<N, double>::generateIdComponent(i) - id(i)) < 1.e-14' SUCCESS : assertion: 'std::abs(tensor<N, double>::generateIdComponent(i) - id(i)) < 1.e-14' SUCCESS : assertion: 'std::abs(tensor<N, double>::generateIdComponent(i) - id(i)) < 1.e-14'
